title: pyrethrum demnatense
intro: Pyrethrum demnatense, also known as Dalmatian pyrethrum, is a flowering plant of the daisy family, known for its bright yellow and red flowers. The medicinal properties of Pyrethrum demnatense come from its leaves and flowers, which contain pyrethrins, a natural insecticide. The plant has been used for its health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving rheumatic pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Pyrethrum demnatense include infusions, tinctures, and ointments, which can be used topically or internally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
